name: Strawberry Punch
recipeIngredient: 3 cans Orange juice concentrate - 6 oz each
3 cans Pink lemonade concentrate - 6 oz each
2 packages Strawberries, frozen with syrup - 10 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Add cold water to the fruit juice concentrates as directed on the cans.
2. Stir in the ginger ale and frozen strawberries.
3. Add ice cubes.
